$comment: Research plan managed by scripts/research_plan.py. See references/research-plan-protocol.md for the protocol. Do not hand-edit task status fields while a task is running; use the script's mark/add-task/block subcommands so the schema stays valid.
title: Example: comparison of headless-browser frameworks for crawling academic OAI-PMH endpoints

execution_profile.checkpoint_policy: write findings to declared output files immediately; split the task before reading sources or inputs that risk exceeding the context budget

scope: Evaluate the suitability of Playwright, Selenium, and Puppeteer for programmatic, lawful crawling of OAI-PMH endpoints exposed by academic-repository hosts. The output is a comparison report with reproducible benchmarks and a recommendation.

sub_questions.text: Which frameworks support the OAI-PMH XML response shape natively vs. need adapters?
How does each framework's default rate-limiting interact with the OAI-PMH spec's resumption-token model?
What is the failure mode of each framework when the OAI-PMH endpoint returns standard error verbs (badArgument, badResumptionToken, ...)?

stopping_criteria: Stop once every sub-question has at least 3 sources covering its evidence ledger, AND the contradiction pass has run, AND the reproducibility checklist passes, AND the report has been rendered with citations.

tasks.description: Read the OAI-PMH 2.0 spec and write a one-page summary.
